results.question: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT DateKey, Date, Fiscal Year, Fiscal Quarter, Month, MonthKey, Full Date, SalesAmount, TotalProductCost, SalesAmount - TotalProductCost AS GrossProfit, (SalesAmount - TotalProductCost) / SalesAmount AS GrossMarginPct, OrderQuantity AS TotalOrderLines FROM Sales INNER JOIN Date ON Sales.OrderDateKey = Date.DateKey WHERE Fiscal Year = '2021' ORDER BY Fiscal Year, MonthKey\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT \\n  \\\"Channel\\\", \\n  SUM(\\\"Sales Amount\\\") AS \\\"total_revenue\\\", \\n  (SUM(\\\"Sales Amount\\\")) / (SELECT SUM(\\\"Sales Amount\\\") FROM \\\"Sales\\\") * 100 AS \\\"revenue_share_pct\\\", \\n  COUNT(DISTINCT \\\"Sales Order\\\") AS \\\"total_orders\\\", \\n  COUNT(\\\"Sales Order Line\\\") AS \\\"order_lines\\\", \\n  AVG(\\\"Sales Amount\\\") / COUNT(\\\"Sales Order Line\\\") AS \\\"avg_line_amount\\\", \\n  (\\\"Sales Amount\\\" - \\\"Total Product Cost\\\") / \\\"Sales Amount\\\" * 100 AS \\\"gross_margin_pct\\\" \\nFROM \\\"Sales\\\" \\nWHERE \\\"Channel\\\" IN ('Reseller', 'Internet') \\nGROUP BY \\\"Channel\\\" \\nORDER BY \\\"total_revenue\\\" DESC;\"}}, {\"name\": \"results_ok\", \"arguments\": {}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT T1.Category, SUM(T2.SalesAmount) AS Revenue, SUM(T2.SalesAmount) / SUM(T2.SalesAmount) * 100 AS RevenueSharePct, SUM(T2.OrderQuantity) AS UnitsSold, SUM(T2.TotalProductCost) AS GrossProfit, SUM(T2.TotalProductCost) / SUM(T2.SalesAmount) * 100 AS GrossMarginPct FROM Sales AS T2 JOIN Product AS T1 ON T2.ProductKey = T1.ProductKey GROUP BY T1.Category ORDER BY Revenue DESC\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT Product, Category, Subcategory, SUM(Extended Amount) AS revenue, SUM(Order Quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(Product Standard Cost) AS gross_profit, (SUM(Extended Amount) - SUM(Product Standard Cost)) / SUM(Extended Amount) * 100 AS margin_pct FROM Sales GROUP BY Product, Category, Subcategory ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10;\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: Show revenue and units sold broken down by territory group, country, region, and fiscal year. Return columns: Group, Country, Region, Fiscal Year, revenue, units_sold. Sort by Group, Country, Region, then Fiscal Year all ascending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT \\n  Sales_Territory.Group, \\n  Sales_Territory.Country, \\n  Sales_Territory.Region, \\n  Date.Fiscal Year, \\n  SUM(Sales.Sales Amount) AS Revenue, \\n  SUM(Sales.Order Quantity) AS Units_Sold \\nFROM \\n  Sales \\n  JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales.ResellerKey = Sales_Territory.ResellerKey \\n  JOIN Date ON Sales.OrderDateKey = Date.DateKey \\nGROUP BY \\n  Sales_Territory.Group, \\n  Sales_Territory.Country, \\n  Sales_Territory.Region, \\n  Date.Fiscal Year \\nORDER BY \\n  Sales_Territory.Group, \\n  Sales_Territory.Country, \\n  Sales_Territory.Region, \\n  Date.Fiscal Year \\n;\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT \\n  c.Customer, \\n  c.City, \\n  c.State-Province, \\n  c.Country-Region, \\n  COUNT(*) AS total_orders, \\n  SUM(l.OrderQuantity) AS total_line_items, \\n  SUM(l.OrderQuantity) AS total_units, \\n  SUM(l.ExtendedAmount) AS lifetime_revenue, \\n  SUM(l.SalesAmount) AS lifetime_profit \\nFROM \\n  Customer c \\nJOIN \\n  Sales l \\nON \\n  c.CustomerKey = l.CustomerKey \\nWHERE \\n  c.CustomerKey != -1 \\nGROUP BY \\n  c.Customer, \\n  c.City, \\n  c.State-Province, \\n  c.Country-Region \\nORDER BY \\n  lifetime_revenue DESC \\nLIMIT 15;\"}}, {\"name\": \"results_ok\", \"arguments\": {}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT \\n  Channel, \\n  Category, \\n  Fiscal Year AS prior_year, \\n  SUM(SalesAmount) AS prior_revenue, \\n  Fiscal Year + 1 AS current_year, \\n  SUM(SalesAmount) AS current_revenue, \\n  (SUM(SalesAmount) / SUM(SalesAmount)) * 100 - 100 AS yoy_growth_pct \\nFROM \\n  Sales \\nJOIN Date ON Sales.OrderDateKey = Date.DateKey \\nWHERE \\n  Channel = 'Online' \\n  AND Category = 'Electronics' \\n  AND Fiscal Year IN (2017, 2018) \\nGROUP BY \\n  Channel, \\n  Category, \\n  Fiscal Year \\nORDER BY \\n  Channel, \\n  Category, \\n  prior_year \\nASC\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT \\n  Sales_Territory.Region, \\n  Sales_Territory.Country, \\n  Sales_Territory.Group, \\n  SUM(Sales.SalesAmount) AS total_revenue, \\n  SUM(Sales.OrderQuantity) AS units_sold, \\n  total_revenue / SUM(Sales.OrderQuantity) AS revenue_per_unit, \\n  AVG(Product.ListPrice) AS avg_list_price, \\n  100 * (1 - SUM(Sales.SalesAmount) / (Product.StandardCost * SUM(Sales.OrderQuantity))) AS realized_discount_pct, \\n  SUM(Product.StandardCost * Sales.OrderQuantity) AS gross_profit, \\n  (100 * SUM(Product.StandardCost * Sales.OrderQuantity)) / (Product.StandardCost * SUM(Sales.OrderQuantity)) AS margin_pct \\nFROM \\n  Sales \\nJOIN \\n  Sales_Territory ON Sales.SalesTerritoryKey = Sales_Territory.SalesTerritoryKey \\nJOIN \\n  Product ON Sales.ProductKey = Product.ProductKey \\nGROUP BY \\n  Sales_Territory.Region, \\n  Sales_Territory.Country, \\n  Sales_Territory.Group, \\n  total_revenue, \\n  units_sold, \\n  avg_list_price, \\n  realized_discount_pct, \\n  gross_profit, \\n  margin_pct \\nORDER BY \\n  Sales_Territory.Region ASC, \\n  total_revenue DESC\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT \\n  Channel, \\n  Category, \\n  Fiscal Quarter AS prior_quarter, \\n  SUM(Sales Amount) AS prior_revenue, \\n  Fiscal Quarter AS current_quarter, \\n  SUM(Sales Amount) AS current_revenue, \\n  (SUM(Sales Amount) - LAG(SUM(Sales Amount)) OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY Fiscal Quarter)) / LAG(SUM(Sales Amount)) OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY Fiscal Quarter) AS qoq_growth_pct \\nFROM Sales \\nGROUP BY Channel, Category, Fiscal Quarter \\nORDER BY Channel, Category, prior_quarter ASC\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT Category, Subcategory, Revenue, Units_Sold, Gross_Profit, Category_Revenue_Share_Pct FROM (SELECT Category, Subcategory, SUM(Extended_Amount) AS Revenue, SUM(Order_Quantity) AS Units_Sold, SUM((Unit_Price - Standard_Cost) * Order_Quantity) AS Gross_Profit, (SUM(Extended_Amount) / SUM(Extended_Amount)) * 100 AS Category_Revenue_Share_Pct FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales.ProductKey = Product.ProductKey GROUP BY Category, Subcategory) AS Revenue_Sales WHERE Revenue > 0 ORDER BY Category, Revenue_Rank, Subcategory\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.
results.error: API error (500): {"error":{"code":500,"message":"Failed to parse input at pos 1: {\"name\": \"run_sql_query\", \"arguments\": {\"sql\": \"SELECT \\n  Channel, \\n  Category, \\n  SUM(Total_Sales) AS revenue, \\n  SUM(Total_Sales) / SUM(Total_Sales) * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct, \\n  (SUM(Total_Sales) / SUM(Total_Sales) * 100) / (COUNT(DISTINCT Sales_Order) + 1) AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, \\n  COUNT(DISTINCT Sales_Order) AS orders, \\n  SUM(Gross_Profit) AS gross_profit \\nFROM \\n  (SELECT \\n    Sales_Territory.Channel, \\n    Product_Category.Category, \\n    Sales_SalesOrderLine.Sales_SalesOrderLineKey, \\n    Sales_SalesOrderLine.Sales_SalesOrderLineKey AS Total_Sales, \\n    Sales_SalesOrderLine.Sales_SalesOrderLineKey AS Gross_Profit \\n  FROM \\n    Sales_SalesOrderLine \\n    JOIN Sales_SalesOrder \\n      ON Sales_SalesOrderLine.Sales_SalesOrderLineKey = Sales_SalesOrder.Sales_SalesOrderKey \\n    JOIN Sales_Territory \\n      ON Sales_SalesOrder.Sales_SalesOrderKey = Sales_Territory.Sales_SalesOrderKey \\n    JOIN Product_Category \\n      ON Product_Category.Product_CategoryKey = Product_Category.Product_CategoryKey \\n  WHERE \\n    Sales_Territory.Channel = 'Online' \\n    AND Product_Category.Category = 'Electronics' \\n  GROUP BY \\n    Sales_Territory.Channel, \\n    Product_Category.Category, \\n    Sales_SalesOrderLine.Sales_SalesOrderLineKey) \\nGROUP BY \\n  Channel, \\n  Category \\nORDER BY \\n  Channel ASC, \\n  Total_Sales DESC, \\n  Category ASC\"}}]","type":"server_error"}}

results.question: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue.
